goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 13:45'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'attraction type', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to birmingham new street
The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 13:45
Make sure you get departure time, price, and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number, attraction type, and postcode
